kpi.prompt: Anteil des Umsatzes der zehn größten Kunden seit Jahresanfang am Gesamtumsatz seit Jahresanfang, in Prozent; ein einzelner Datensatz.
kpi.sql_string:
WITH customer_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        so.customer_number,
        SUM(so.net_revenue) AS revenue
    FROM sales_orders so
    LEFT JOIN projects p
        ON so.project_id = p.project_id
    WHERE so.status NOT IN ('created', 'canceled', 'unknown')
      AND so.date >= date_trunc('year', current_date)
      AND so.date < dateadd(year, 1, date_trunc('year', current_date))
      AND (p.abbreviation IS NULL OR p.abbreviation <> '')
    GROUP BY 1
),
top10 AS (
    SELECT
        customer_number,
        revenue
    FROM customer_revenue
    ORDER BY revenue DESC
    LIMIT 10
),
total_revenue AS (
    SELECT SUM(revenue) AS revenue
    FROM customer_revenue
)
SELECT
    ROUND(
        100.0 * COALESCE((SELECT SUM(revenue) FROM top10), 0)
        / NULLIF((SELECT revenue FROM total_revenue), 0),
        2
    ) AS top10_customer_revenue_share_percent;

en.title: Top-10 customer share
en.description: Share of YTD revenue concentrated in the ten largest customers — proxy for customer dependency risk.

de.title: Top-10-Kunden-Anteil
de.description: Anteil des Umsatzes seit Jahresbeginn auf die zehn größten Kunden — Indikator für Kundenkonzentrations-Risiko.
